name: ¡Dios mío! ¡Es un tortuga!
description: Esta es una tortuga terrestre. Vive en tierra y se ve ¡INCREÍBLEMENTE LINDA!

moves.name: Quick Nip
moves.desc: It's a bite from a tortoise. It hurts. What did you expect?

moves.name: Shell smash
moves.desc: You get crushed by a massive tortoise shell.

moves.name: Terrepair
moves.desc: Hide in your shell, 'cause the world is out to bleed you for a ride What will you gain making your life a little longer Heaven or hell, was the journey cold that gave you eyes of steel Shelter behind painting your mind and playing joker

moves.name: Sandblast
moves.desc: Pelts you with sand which gets in your eyes.
